about.community_desc: This project is built for the community, by the community. We are passionate about the Seven Knights franchise and want to ensure every player has the tools they need to succeed in PVP and PVE modes.
about.footer: Built with cutting-edge tech for the best experience.
about.title: About 7K DB
about.vision_desc: 7K DB is the most comprehensive and up-to-date resource dedicated to Seven Knights Rebirth. Our vision is to provide players with the ultimate tools, precise hero builds, and expert strategies to master every aspect of the game.

contact.contribution_desc1: We are a community-driven project. If you have an optimized build or a new stage strategy that isn't on the site yet, we'd love to hear it.
contact.contribution_desc2: Contributors who provide accurate and useful guides may be featured in our "Contributors List" coming soon!
contact.desc: Reach out to the 7K DB team for feedback, suggestions, or bug reports.
contact.offline_desc: The contact form is currently closed. Please reach out via email instead.

privacy.analytics_desc: We use minimal, anonymous analytics to understand site traffic and usage patterns. This data helps us optimize the user experience and ensures the site remains fast and accessible for everyone.
privacy.external_desc: Our site may contain links to external platforms such as YouTube, Discord, or official game communities. We recommend reviewing their respective privacy policies as they are separate from 7K DB.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.transparency_desc: 7K DB is built for the player experience. We do not require account registration, and we do not collect personal identifying information (PII) from our users. Your privacy is paramount.
